# Portfolio Builder

> Open-source, MIT-licensed portfolio builder. Pick from 297 templates, fill one form (capability-aware), live preview, then download a static site or hand it to any AI coding agent.

Live: https://openpotfolio.lovable.app
Source: https://github.com/vikast908/openpotfolio

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and featured templates.
- [Templates](/templates): Browse all 297 templates; filter with `?tag=<tag>`.
- [Topics](/topics): Tag index with counts; links into filtered Templates.
- [About](/about): How the builder works, AI handoff, contributing, MIT license.
- [Builder](/build/{templateId}): Form + style panel + live preview + export (noindex).
- [Preview](/preview/{templateId}): Full-viewport render; supports `#c=` encoded config (noindex).

## How config works

- Config is a `PortfolioConfig` JSON object (name, bio, projects, theme, etc.).
- Shareable links encode config in the URL fragment: `/build/{templateId}#c=<base64url-json>`.
- Drafts autosave to `localStorage` under `portfolio-builder:draft:{templateId}` after hydrate.
- Templates declare `capabilities.content` so the form only edits fields that template renders.
- Rich sections (case studies, testimonials, ...) live in `src/templates/rich-sections.ts` for PM-style templates.

## Export

1. Static zip - `index.html`, `portfolio.json`, MIT LICENSE, README.
2. Shareable link - restores the builder with the same config.
3. AI agent prompt - open or paste into Lovable, ChatGPT, Claude, or v0.
